verses.1: “Sing, barren, you who didn’t give birth!
verses.3: For you will spread out on the right hand and on the left;
verses.4: “Don’t be afraid, for you will not be ashamed.
verses.5: For your Maker is your husband; the LORD of Armies is his name.
verses.6: For the LORD has called you as a wife forsaken and grieved in spirit,
verses.7: “For a small moment I have forsaken you,
verses.8: In overflowing wrath I hid my face from you for a moment,
verses.9: “For this is like the waters of Noah to me;
verses.11: “You afflicted, tossed with storms, and not comforted,
verses.12: I will make your pinnacles of rubies,
verses.13: All your children will be taught by the LORD,
verses.14: You will be established in righteousness.
verses.15: Behold, they may gather together, but not by me.
verses.16: “Behold, I have created the blacksmith who fans the coals into flame,
verses.17: No weapon that is formed against you will prevail;
